## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines (`black`, `flake8`, `isort`)
- [ ] I have run `mypy` and resolved all type errors
- [ ] I have added or updated unit/integration tests for my changes
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass (`pytest --cov=src`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation where applicable (`docs/`)
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I have assigned a reviewer
- [ ] CI checks are passing
